scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core value proposition: personalized AI learning that meets the user exactly where they are.
- Visually breaks down the learning journey from beginner to advanced, making fluency feel structured and achievable.
- Uses relatable Hindi-English code-mixing in the headers to make the user feel understood and unintimidated.
- Drives action with a clear, encouraging call-to-action to start practicing.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova AI के साथ English बोलना सीखें, जो आपके level को समझे [Learn to speak English with Supernova AI, which understands your level]

Level 1: शुरुआत (Beginner)
• hello / hi / bye
• name, age, country
• yes / no / please / thank you
• food, water, coffee
• work, home, family
• good, bad, big, small
• I like / I don't like
• What is this?
• I want / I need
• numbers 1-100, colors, days

Level 2: थोड़ा बेहतर (Elementary)
• usually / sometimes
• yesterday / tomorrow / now
• can / can't / have to
• go, come, take, say
• friend, weekend, movie
• I think / I guess
• how much? / how many?
• because / but / and
• do the dishes, make the bed
• I'm tired / I'm hungry

Level 3: रोज़मर्रा की बातचीत (Intermediate)
• I've been / I've done
• kind of / really / actually
• honestly / to be honest
• depends / not sure
• busy, excited, frustrated, worried
• What do you mean?
• avoid / take care of
• in my opinion / I agree / I disagree
• habits, goals, challenges
• daily routine, healthy lifestyle, bad habits

Level 4: फर्राटेदार English (Upper Intermediate)
• finally / basically / obviously
• figure out / deal with / run out of
• confident / overwhelmed / disappointed
• could have / should have / would have
• as far as I know / as soon as possible
• to be honest / to tell the truth
• at the end of the day / make sense
• mindset / attention span / multitasking
• small difference, long-term solution
• as far as I know / as soon as possible

आज ही शुरू करें [START NOW]
